parameters.command:
=set -euo pipefail
cd /vault

REPO_URL="${VAULT_REMOTE_URL:-}"
TOKEN="${GH_TOKEN_VAULT:-}"
BRANCH="{{ $json.branch }}"
MSG={{ JSON.stringify($json.message) }}

if [ -z "$REPO_URL" ] || [ -z "$TOKEN" ]; then
  echo "VAULT_REMOTE_URL and GH_TOKEN_VAULT must be provided as workflow env"
  exit 2
fi

# Нормализуем remote с токеном (без логирования)
AUTHED_URL=$(printf '%s' "$REPO_URL" | sed -E "s#https://#https://x-oauth-basic:${TOKEN}@#")

git fetch "$AUTHED_URL" "$BRANCH" --depth=1 || true
git checkout -B "$BRANCH" || git checkout "$BRANCH"
git reset --mixed FETCH_HEAD 2>/dev/null || true

FILES_JSON='{{ JSON.stringify($json.files) }}'
if [ "$FILES_JSON" != "[]" ]; then
  echo "$FILES_JSON" | python3 -c 'import sys,json,subprocess; [subprocess.check_call(["git","add","--",p]) for p in json.load(sys.stdin)]'
else
  git add -A
fi

if git diff --cached --quiet; then
  echo "no changes to commit"
  exit 0
fi

git -c user.email=ai@automind -c user.name='АвтоMind AI' commit -m "$MSG"
git push "$AUTHED_URL" "HEAD:$BRANCH"
echo "pushed to $BRANCH"

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO metrics (workflow, metric, value, tags)
VALUES ('13-obsidian-git-commit', 'commit', 1, $1::jsonb);

options.queryReplacement: ={{ JSON.stringify({ branch: $('Validate Input').item.json.branch, files: $('Validate Input').item.json.files.length, ok: !$json.exitCode }) }}
